mandatory.description: Mandatory features for all Door Lock implementations

optional.name: PIN Credential
optional.description: Device supports PIN for lock/unlock operations

optional.name: RFID Credential
optional.description: Device supports RFID for lock/unlock operations

optional.name: Finger Credentials
optional.description: Device supports finger-related credentials (fingerprint, finger vein)

optional.name: Credential Over The Air Access
optional.description: Supports PIN code over-the-air for remote operations

optional.name: Aliro Provisioning
optional.description: Supports Aliro protocol for BLE-based credentials

optional.name: Unbolting
optional.description: Device supports unbolt door command without latch release

AccessControl.description: Command and attribute access privilege requirements

properties.name: OperateLevelLockCommands
properties.description: LockDoor, UnlockDoor, UnlockWithTimeout, UnboltDoor commands SHALL require Operate privilege level
properties.specification_text: LockDoor: Access=O T; UnlockDoor: Access=O T; UnboltDoor: Access=O T
properties.formal_property: FORALL cmd IN {LockDoor, UnlockDoor, UnlockWithTimeout, UnboltDoor}: RequiredAccessLevel(cmd) = Operate

properties.name: AdminLevelCredentialManagement
properties.description: SetPINCode, SetRFIDCode, SetUser, SetCredential, ClearCredential commands SHALL require Administer privilege level
properties.specification_text: SetPINCode: Access=A T; SetCredential: Access=A T; SetUser: Access=A T; ClearCredential: Access=A T
properties.formal_property: FORALL cmd IN {SetPINCode, SetRFIDCode, SetUser, SetCredential, ClearCredential, ClearUser}: RequiredAccessLevel(cmd) = Administer

properties.name: AdminLevelScheduleManagement
properties.description: SetWeekDaySchedule, SetYearDaySchedule, SetHolidaySchedule commands SHALL require Administer privilege level
properties.specification_text: SetWeekDaySchedule: Access=A; SetYearDaySchedule: Access=A; SetHolidaySchedule: Access=A
properties.formal_property: FORALL cmd IN {SetWeekDaySchedule, SetYearDaySchedule, SetHolidaySchedule, ClearWeekDaySchedule, ClearYearDaySchedule, ClearHolidaySchedule}: RequiredAccessLevel(cmd) = Administer

properties.name: AdminLevelAliroConfig
properties.description: SetAliroReaderConfig, ClearAliroReaderConfig commands SHALL require Administer privilege level
properties.specification_text: SetAliroReaderConfig: Access=A T; ClearAliroReaderConfig: Access=A T
properties.formal_property: FORALL cmd IN {SetAliroReaderConfig, ClearAliroReaderConfig}: RequiredAccessLevel(cmd) = Administer

properties.name: AdminLevelSecurityAttributes
properties.description: WrongCodeEntryLimit, SendPINOverTheAir, RequirePINforRemoteOperation, EnableLocalProgramming attributes SHALL require Administer for write access
properties.specification_text: WrongCodeEntryLimit: Access=R[W] VA; SendPINOverTheAir: Access=R[W] VA; RequirePINforRemoteOperation: Access=R[W] VA; EnableLocalProgramming: Access=R[W] VA
properties.formal_property: FORALL attr IN {WrongCodeEntryLimit, SendPINOverTheAir, RequirePINforRemoteOperation, EnableLocalProgramming}: WriteAccessLevel(attr) = Administer

properties.name: TimedInteractionForCriticalCommands
properties.description: Commands that modify credentials or lock state SHALL require Timed Interaction
properties.specification_text: LockDoor: Access=O T (T=Timed); SetPINCode: Access=A T; SetCredential: Access=A T; SetAliroReaderConfig: Access=A T
properties.formal_property: FORALL cmd IN {LockDoor, UnlockDoor, SetPINCode, SetCredential, SetUser, ClearUser}: RequireTimedInteraction(cmd) = TRUE

StateIntegrity.description: Valid state transitions and state consistency requirements

properties.name: ValidLockStateTransitions
properties.description: LockState SHALL only transition through valid states: NotFullyLocked, Locked, Unlocked, Unlatched
properties.specification_text: LockState values: NotFullyLocked(0), Locked(1), Unlocked(2), Unlatched(3)

properties.name: ValidDoorStateTransitions
properties.description: DoorState SHALL only have valid states from DoorStateEnum
properties.specification_text: DoorStateEnum values: DoorOpen(0), DoorClosed(1), DoorJammed(2), DoorForcedOpen(3), DoorUnspecifiedError(4), DoorAjar(5)
properties.formal_property: DoorState IN {DoorOpen, DoorClosed, DoorJammed, DoorForcedOpen, DoorUnspecifiedError, DoorAjar}

properties.name: OperatingModeConstraints
properties.description: OperatingMode SHALL restrict access based on mode: Privacy disables all, Vacation disables keypad/RFID, NoRemoteLockUnlock disables remote
properties.specification_text: Privacy: Keypad=N, Remote=N, RFID=N; Vacation: Keypad=N, Remote=Y, RFID=N; NoRemoteLockUnlock: Keypad=Y, Remote=N, RFID=Y
properties.formal_property: (OperatingMode = Privacy) => (RemoteEnabled = FALSE AND KeypadEnabled = FALSE AND RFIDEnabled = FALSE)

properties.name: PrivacyModeEntryConstraint
properties.description: Privacy mode SHALL only be possible if the door is locked
properties.specification_text: This mode is only possible if the door is locked. Manual unlocking changes the mode to Normal operating mode.

properties.name: ActuatorEnableConstraint
properties.description: When ActuatorEnabled is FALSE, the lock SHALL NOT process remote Lock/Unlock commands
properties.specification_text: This attribute SHALL indicate if the lock is currently able to (Enabled) or not able to (Disabled) process remote Lock, Unlock, or Unlock with Timeout commands.

PhysicalSafety.description: Physical safety protections for the door lock

properties.name: AutoRelockProtection
properties.description: If AutoRelockTime is supported, lock SHALL automatically re-lock after the specified timeout
properties.specification_text: If the attribute AutoRelockTime is supported the lock will transition to the locked state when the auto relock time has expired.
properties.formal_property: AutoRelockTime_supported AND UnlockDoor_executed => EVENTUALLY(LockState = Locked, timeout=AutoRelockTime)

properties.name: DoorForcedOpenDetection
properties.description: When door is forced open under locked condition, DoorLockAlarm event SHALL be generated with DoorForcedOpen alarm code
properties.specification_text: DoorForcedOpen(6): Forced Door Open under Door Locked Condition. Conformance: [DPS]

properties.name: LockJammedAlarm
properties.description: When locking mechanism jams, DoorLockAlarm event SHALL be generated with LockJammed alarm code
properties.specification_text: LockJammed(0): Locking Mechanism Jammed. Conformance: M (Mandatory)

properties.name: TamperDetection
properties.description: FrontEscutcheonRemoved alarm SHALL be generated when front panel is tampered
properties.specification_text: FrontEsceutcheonRemoved(5): Tamper Alarm - front escutcheon removed from main. Conformance: O

properties.name: RequirePINForRemoteOperation
properties.description: When RequirePINforRemoteOperation is TRUE, PINCode field SHALL be provided and verified for remote lock/unlock commands
properties.specification_text: If the RequirePINforRemoteOperation attribute is True then PINCode field SHALL be provided and the door lock SHALL NOT grant access if it is not provided.

properties.name: PINVerificationMandatoryWhenProvided
properties.description: If PINCode field is provided, lock SHALL verify it regardless of RequirePINForRemoteOperation setting
properties.specification_text: If the PINCode field is provided, the door lock SHALL verify PINCode before granting access regardless of the value of RequirePINForRemoteOperation attribute.

properties.name: CredentialRuleEnforcement
properties.description: Lock SHALL enforce CredentialRule for user: Single (1 credential), Dual (2 credentials), Tri (3 credentials)
properties.specification_text: Single(0): Only one credential is required for lock operation. Dual(1): Any two credentials are required. Tri(2): Any three credentials are required.

properties.name: DuplicateCredentialPrevention
properties.description: SetPINCode/SetCredential SHALL reject duplicate PIN/credential codes
properties.specification_text: Return status: DUPLICATE - Setting PIN code failed because it would create a duplicate PIN code.

properties.name: AliroCredentialValidation
properties.description: Aliro credentials SHALL be 65-byte uncompressed elliptic curve public keys per SEC 1
properties.specification_text: Credentials of this type SHALL be 65-byte uncompressed elliptic curve public keys as defined in section 2.3.3 of [SEC 1].

properties.name: SendPINOverTheAirControl
properties.description: SendPINOverTheAir attribute controls whether PIN codes can be transmitted in commands
properties.specification_text: SendPINOverTheAir: bool, Access=R[W] VA, Conformance=[!USR & PIN]

properties.name: AliroSigningKeyProtection
properties.description: Aliro Signing Key SHALL be saved internally and NOT exposed via any attribute
properties.specification_text: The door lock server SHALL save the SigningKey internally.

properties.name: PINCodeASCIIFormat
properties.description: PIN/RFID codes SHALL be ASCII encoded octet strings
properties.specification_text: All value in the PIN/RFID code SHALL be ASCII encoded regardless if the PIN/RFID codes are number or characters. For example, code of '1, 2, 3, 4' SHALL be represented as 0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34.

properties.name: AliroPublicKeyReadable
properties.description: Aliro public keys (verification keys) are safe to read as they do not allow lock operation
properties.specification_text: Since the Aliro credentials are public keys, there is no security risk in allowing them to be read. Possession of the credential octet string does not allow operating the lock.

Availability.description: Brute force protection and availability guarantees

properties.name: WrongCodeEntryLimitEnforcement
properties.description: Invalid PIN attempts SHALL be counted towards WrongCodeEntryLimit; when exceeded, UserCodeTemporaryDisableTime lockout SHALL be triggered
properties.specification_text: When the PINCode field is provided an invalid PIN will count towards the WrongCodeEntryLimit and the UserCodeTemporaryDisableTime will be triggered if the WrongCodeEntryLimit is exceeded.

properties.name: LockoutDuringDisableTime
properties.description: Lock SHALL ignore lock/unlock attempts during UserCodeTemporaryDisableTime
properties.specification_text: The lock SHALL ignore any attempts to lock/unlock the door until the UserCodeTemporaryDisableTime expires.

properties.name: WrongCodeEntryLimitAlarm
properties.description: WrongCodeEntryLimit exceeded SHALL generate DoorLockAlarm with WrongCodeEntryLimit alarm code
properties.specification_text: WrongCodeEntryLimit(4): Tamper Alarm - wrong code entry limit. Conformance: [USR]

properties.name: InsufficientBatteryProtection
properties.description: Lock operation error SHALL be reported when battery is insufficient to safely actuate
properties.specification_text: InsufficientBattery(4): Lock/unlock error caused by insufficient battery power left to safely actuate the lock. Conformance: O

properties.name: NoRemoteLockUnlockModeResponse
properties.description: In NoRemoteLockUnlock mode, lock SHALL respond to remote commands with Failure status
properties.specification_text: For modes that disable the remote interface, the door lock SHALL respond to Lock, Unlock, Toggle, and Unlock with Timeout commands with a response status Failure and not take the action requested by those commands.

Authorization.description: User type and schedule-based access control

properties.name: DisabledUserDenied
properties.description: Users with OccupiedDisabled status SHALL be denied access with error DisabledUserDenied
properties.specification_text: DisabledUserDenied(2): Lock/unlock error caused by disabled USER or credential. Conformance: M

properties.name: ScheduleRestrictedAccess
properties.description: ScheduleRestrictedUser access SHALL be denied if current time is outside configured schedules
properties.specification_text: If no WeekDaySchedules and no YearDaySchedules are set for the user, then access SHALL be denied

properties.name: WeekDayScheduleEnforcement
properties.description: WeekDayScheduleUser access SHALL be granted if and only if current time falls within configured schedules
properties.specification_text: user access SHALL be granted if and only if the current time falls within at least one of the WeekDaySchedules. If current time is not known, user access SHALL NOT be granted.

properties.name: DisposableUserSingleUse
properties.description: DisposableUser SHALL have access disabled after first successful use
properties.specification_text: the user has the ability to open lock once after which the lock SHALL change the corresponding user record UserStatus value to OccupiedDisabled automatically.

properties.name: ExpiringUserTimeout
properties.description: ExpiringUser access SHALL be disabled after ExpiringUserTimeout minutes from first use
properties.specification_text: the user has the ability to open lock for ExpiringUserTimeout attribute minutes after the first use of the PIN code... After ExpiringUserTimeout minutes the corresponding user record UserStatus value SHALL be set to OccupiedDisabled automatically
properties.formal_property: (User.UserType = ExpiringUser) AND (CurrentTime > FirstUseTime + ExpiringUserTimeout) => User.UserStatus := OccupiedDisabled

properties.name: RemoteOnlyUserKeypadRestriction
properties.description: RemoteOnlyUser PIN code SHALL only work via remote commands, not at keypad
properties.specification_text: the user access and PIN code is restricted to remote lock/unlock commands only. This type of user might be useful for regular delivery services or voice assistant unlocking operations to prevent a PIN code credential created for them from being used at the keypad.

properties.name: NonAccessUserNoEntry
properties.description: NonAccessUser SHALL be recognized but NOT granted door access
properties.specification_text: the user is recognized by the lock but does not have the ability to open the lock. This user will only cause the lock to generate the appropriate event notification to any bound devices.

properties.name: ForcedUserSilentAlarm
properties.description: ForcedUser credential SHALL unlock door but trigger ForcedUser silent alarm
properties.specification_text: the user has the ability to open lock but a ForcedUser LockOperationType and ForcedUser silent alarm will be emitted to allow a notified Node to alert emergency services
properties.formal_property: (User.UserType = ForcedUser) AND AccessGranted => GenerateEvent(LockOperation, LockOperationType=ForcedUserEvent) AND SilentAlarm

properties.name: UnlockWithTimeoutBehavior
properties.description: UnlockWithTimeout SHALL automatically re-lock after specified timeout, overriding AutoRelockTime
properties.specification_text: After the time in seconds specified in the timeout field, the lock device will relock itself automatically. This timeout parameter is only temporary for this message transition and overrides the default relock time as specified in the AutoRelockTime attribute.

properties.name: ScheduleTimeValidation
properties.description: Schedule EndTime SHALL be greater than StartTime
properties.specification_text: LocalEndTime SHALL be greater than LocalStartTime.

properties.name: ExpiringUserTimeoutPersistence
properties.description: ExpiringUserTimeout SHALL persist across reboots
properties.specification_text: The lock SHALL persist the timeout across reboots such that the ExpiringUserTimeout is honored.

properties.name: HolidayScheduleOperatingModeOverride
properties.description: Holiday schedule SHALL override normal operating mode during active period
properties.specification_text: Set the holiday Schedule by specifying local start time and local end time with respect to any Lock Operating Mode.

properties.name: DoorLockAlarmGeneration
properties.description: DoorLockAlarm event SHALL be generated with CRITICAL priority for security-relevant alarms
properties.specification_text: DoorLockAlarm: Priority=CRITICAL, Access=V, Conformance=M. The door lock server provides several alarms which can be sent when there is a critical state on the door lock.

properties.name: LockOperationEventGeneration
properties.description: LockOperation event SHALL be generated for all lock operations with CRITICAL priority for Unlock/ForcedUserEvent
properties.specification_text: If the LockOperationType reported in the LockOperation event is Unlock or ForcedUserEvent then the priority SHALL be CRITICAL; otherwise it MAY be INFO.

properties.name: LockOperationErrorEventGeneration
properties.description: LockOperationError event SHALL be generated with CRITICAL priority for DisabledUserDenied or Lock operation type
properties.specification_text: If the OperationError reported in the LockOperationError event is DisabledUserDenied or the LockOperationType is Lock the priority SHALL be CRITICAL; otherwise it MAY be INFO.
properties.formal_property: (OperationError = DisabledUserDenied OR LockOperationType = Lock) => LockOperationError.Priority = CRITICAL

properties.name: LockUserChangeEventGeneration
properties.description: LockUserChange event SHALL be generated when user, schedule, or credential is added/modified/cleared
properties.specification_text: The door lock server sends out a LockUserChange event when a lock user, schedule, or credential change has occurred.

properties.name: DoorStateChangeEventGeneration
properties.description: DoorStateChange event SHALL be generated with CRITICAL priority when door state is not DoorClosed
properties.specification_text: If the DoorState reported in the DoorStateChange event is not DoorClosed then the priority SHALL be CRITICAL; otherwise it MAY be INFO.

properties.name: CredentialChangeAuditTrail
properties.description: LockUserChange event SHALL include CreatorFabricIndex and LastModifiedFabricIndex for audit tracking
properties.specification_text: This field SHALL indicate the credential's creator fabric index... This field SHALL indicate the credential's last modifier fabric index.

properties.name: RemoteOperationNodeTracking
properties.description: For remote operations, FabricIndex and SourceNode SHALL NOT be null
properties.specification_text: This SHALL NOT be null if the operation source is 'Remote'.

CrossCluster.description: Dependencies and interactions with other clusters

properties.name: StandaloneOperation
properties.description: Door Lock cluster operates independently without mandatory cross-cluster dependencies
properties.specification_text: Door Lock cluster is classified as Application cluster with Endpoint scope

critical_commands.risk: Unauthorized physical access if authentication bypassed
Privilege escalation by adding unauthorized credentials
critical_commands.mitigation: Administer privilege required, Timed Interaction, LockUserChange audit event

critical_commands.risk: Denial of service by revoking all Aliro device access
critical_commands.mitigation: Administer privilege, explicit user permission required per spec note
INVALID_IN_STATE if config exists, must explicitly clear first

critical_attributes.risk: If set to FALSE, remote unlock without PIN verification
If set too high, enables brute force attacks
PIN exposure in commands if TRUE
critical_attributes.mitigation: Default FALSE, Administer access to change

duress_protection.ForcedUser: Silent alarm triggers emergency notification while granting access
